name: Mediterranean Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip the skin off the chicken.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except butter in a bowl.
3. Dip each piece of chicken in the melted butter, then coat evenly with the crumb mixture.
4. Arrange the chicken pieces so they don't touch in a large, shallow, buttered baking dish.
5. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) until the chicken is tender, about 1 hour.
6. Trim with parsley before serving.
